title: isotrema longlinense
intro: Isotrema longlinense, also known as the Longlinense tree or Longlin tree, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, native to Laos and Thailand. The medicinal properties of Isotrema longlinense have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Isotrema longlinense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia.
